nasb.text: Abraham came near and said, “Will You indeed sweep away the righteous with the wicked?

esv.text: Then Abraham drew near and said, “Will you indeed sweep away the righteous with the wicked?

cnv.text: 亞伯拉罕上前說：“你真的要把義人和惡人一同除滅嗎？

ccb.text: 亚伯拉罕上前说：“你要把义人和恶人一同毁灭吗？

csbs.text: 亚伯拉罕近前来说：“你真要把义人与恶人一同除灭吗？
